description: Install dependencies and verify baseline compiles for all 3 apps. Add framer-motion, react-virtuoso to quantube and quantmax (quantai already has framer-motion). Add @quant/brand as workspace dependency to all 3 apps. Run pnpm install, then run typecheck for each app.
steps: Add @quant/brand workspace:* to dependencies in apps/quantube/package.json, apps/quantmax/package.json, apps/quantai/package.json
Add framer-motion ^11.0.0 to apps/quantube/package.json and apps/quantmax/package.json dependencies
Add react-virtuoso ^4.0.0 to all 3 apps' package.json dependencies
Add tailwindcss ^3.4.13, postcss ^8.4.47, autoprefixer ^10.4.20 to apps/quantube/package.json devDependencies (quantmax and quantai already have them)
Run pnpm --filter @quant/quantube typecheck to check current state (may have pre-existing errors - note them)
Run pnpm --filter @quant/quantmax typecheck to check current state
Run pnpm --filter @quant/quantai typecheck to check current state
acceptance_criteria: @quant/brand is listed in all 3 package.json files
framer-motion is listed in quantube and quantmax package.json
react-virtuoso is listed in all 3 package.json files
verification: Run pnpm install and confirm it exits 0
findings: pnpm install completed successfully. Typecheck baseline: quantube has many pre-existing errors (possibly-undefined, unbuilt shared-ui/server-core dist, missing next/router module). quantmax and quantai both fail only on @quant/database unbuilt in server-core/plugins/prisma.ts. None of these are related to our newly added deps. quantube has no typecheck script so used npx tsc --noEmit directly. All acceptance criteria met.
